title: Hosting a Book Club
description: Running a monthly reading group that becomes a serious conversation.
summary_pt_br: Clube do livro: livros difíceis, três perguntas, silêncio ok, redirecione tangentes, feche com 'o que mudou'.

scenes.subtitle_en: Running a monthly reading group that becomes a serious conversation.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Clube do livro: livros difíceis, três perguntas, silêncio ok, redirecione tangentes, feche com 'o que mudou'.

scenes.text_en: Running a monthly reading group that becomes a serious conversation. Focus: hosting a book club. Pick demanding books — the group rises to the level of the reading.
scenes.text_pt: Clube do livro: livros difíceis, três perguntas, silêncio ok, redirecione tangentes, feche com 'o que mudou'. Foco: hosting a book club. Escolha livros difíceis — o grupo sobe ao nível da leitura.

scenes.title: Hosting a Book Club
scenes.body_en: Book-club hosting: pick demanding books. Prepare three questions. Let silence breathe. Redirect tangents gently. End with what changed your mind.
scenes.body_pt: Clube do livro: livros difíceis, três perguntas, silêncio ok, redirecione tangentes, feche com 'o que mudou'.

examples.en: Pick demanding books — the group rises to the level of the reading.
examples.pt: Escolha livros difíceis — o grupo sobe ao nível da leitura.

examples.en: Three prepared questions are enough; ten would overwhelm the room.
examples.pt: Três perguntas preparadas bastam; dez sufocariam.

examples.en: End every club by asking what changed your mind this month.
examples.pt: Termine perguntando 'o que mudou de ideia'.

scenes.title: Key vocabulary — Hosting a Book Club

exercise.question: Complete: "Pick ___ books — the group rises to the level of the reading."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Pick demanding books — the group rises to the level of the reading."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Escolha livros difíceis — o grupo sobe ao nível da leitura.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
Three prepared questions are enough; ten would overwhelm the room.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Three prepared questions are enough; ten would overwhelm the room."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Três perguntas preparadas bastam; dez sufocariam.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Hosting a Book Club — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre hosting a book club. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Zara — book selection for your club.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: A member goes on a tangent.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Redirect gently, name the main thread.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How do you close each meeting?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: What changed your mind this month?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: It makes reading personal, not performative.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: A good book club rises to its hardest reading.

scenes.title: The book club
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe four hosting moves. Use at least three book-club terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At her monthly book club, Zara opened the evening with the book everyone had dreaded finishing.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: Pick demanding books — the group always rises to the level of the reading, never falls below it.

paragraphs.speaker: Member
paragraphs.en: Three prepared questions is plenty — ten questions would overwhelm the dialogue and kill the silences that matter.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: I redirect tangents gently, by naming the main thread of the evening we had agreed to pursue together.

paragraphs.speaker: Member
paragraphs.en: And you always close with the same question — what changed your mind about the book this month?

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: A book club, hosted well, rises to its hardest reading — and leaves every member slightly different than when they arrived.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Hosting a Book Club". Running a monthly reading group that becomes a serious conversation. Pick demanding books — the group rises to the level of the reading. Three prepared questions are enough; ten would overwhelm the room. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Hosting a Book Club". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Hosting a Book Club".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Hosting a Book Club".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
